name: Sage Sausage Holiday Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 package Jimmy Dean Sage Sausage, (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine bread, poultry seasoning, chicken broth, and beaten eggs.
2. In a skillet, sauté onions and celery in melted margarine until tender.
3. Add the sausage and brown it slightly.
4. Drain any excess fat from the sausage.
5. Mix the sausage mixture into the bowl with the bread mixture, stirring well.
6. Spoon the dressing into a lightly greased 2-quart baking dish.
7. Cover and bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
Serves 6-8. This recipe will stuff a 10-12 pound turkey.
